title: Crate Logic — Sokoban Studio
description: Push crates onto targets across 8 hand-verified puzzles, build your own levels, and call on a real BFS solver for hints.
concept: A full Sokoban toolkit, not just a single puzzle. Play through eight built-in levels (each verified solvable by the same solver that powers the app), then switch to the level editor to paint your own walls, crates, and targets. A hand-rolled BFS state-space solver with corner-deadlock pruning validates whether your creation is solvable, gives in-play hints, or can auto-solve the whole thing move by move.
features: 8 built-in puzzles + full level editor with paint tools
BFS solver: validate custom levels, get hints, or auto-solve
Undo/redo, move/push counters, and a best-score per level
Share any level via URL, export/import your level pack as JSON
tech: BFS state-space solver with deadlock pruning

interaction.mouse: Swipe on the board, click the D-pad, or use the editor palette to paint
interaction.click: Undo/Reset/Hint/Auto-Solve/Share buttons; palette tools in the editor
interaction.touch: Swipe to move, tap D-pad, tap-and-drag to paint levels
interaction.keyboard: Arrow keys / WASD to move, Ctrl/Cmd+Z to undo
